criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: Names sum-inside-log block, 2^N brute-force vs O(N) per iteration, monotone-convergence guarantee.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Seven rungs build cleanly. Minor: ELBO rung blends visual and algebraic intro into one label.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Exact E-step rule + Q definition + one-line proof chain.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: All symbols defined inline. Minor: ELBO first introduced in payoff without full definition (defined later in narration).

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: All draws executable: scatter, ELBO diagram, E-step inset all specified. Minor: convergence-chain layout (stacked vs side-by-side) unclear.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Highlights follow writes. Minor: at t=182 elbo_diagram highlight in center where gmm_estep/gmm_mstep written at t=150/158 -- potential clutter.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Three distinct draws plus revisited annotations across many beats. Strong visual continuity.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: ELBO, KL, convergence chain, GMM E/M-step all correct. Code uses log-sum-exp correctly. Minor: code variable named 'sigma' (std dev) vs equation showing sigma^2 -- ambiguity.

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: Code at right beat (148s); valid Python with log-sum-exp; matches narration precisely.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: 9 beats / 190s averages 21s/beat. Beat at t=148 introduces both E-step and M-step formulas in one 20s beat -- slightly dense.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Stays tightly on topic. Final highlight at t=182 'reminds the viewer' -- minor redundancy.

topThreeIssues: Board clutter at t=182: highlighting elbo_diagram in center after gmm_estep/gmm_mstep written there (t=150, t=158) -- erase GMM equations first or move closing highlight to unoccupied region
GMM beat density: t=148 introduces E-step soft-assignment AND M-step responsibility-weighted mean in single 20s beat -- split into two beats
ELBO staircase rung conflation: covers both geometric intuition and algebraic derivation; separate into two rungs
summary: Strong plan threading EM from intractability motivation through ELBO construction, E/M-step mechanics, one-line convergence proof, and concrete GMM instantiation with runnable code. Math correct, board specific, destination precise. Main weaknesses: closing canvas-state conflict and slightly dense GMM beat.
